allow: Bash(git commit -m "Initial commit: PhotoDesk — Hebrew/Israeli localization:*)
Bash(git commit -m "Add booking form \(booking.html\) + orders integration:*)
Bash(git commit -m "Fix orders page not rendering and missing customer creation:*)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; plugins=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''{p[""name""]} \({p[""scope""]}\) — {p[""status""]}''''\) for p in plugins]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p\) for p in d]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''{p[""id""]} — enabled:{p[""enabled""]}''''\) for p in d]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''  ✔ {p[""id""]}''''\) for p in d]")
